headline: EXCLUSIVE: White House Releases Official UFC Freedom 250 Fight Card, Features Trump vs. Biden Main Event
deck: Leaked press release reveals presidential bout, Supreme Court battle royal, and Senate vs. quorum undercard
excerpt: Govment.org has obtained the complete fight card for UFC Freedom 250, confirming rumors of a Trump-Biden rematch and revealing McConnell's undefeated 287-0 record. The $700,000 lawn repair is listed as a standard line item alongside fighter purses.

headline: White House Releases Official Fight Card for UFC Freedom 250, Features Trump-Biden Rematch and Nine-Justice Battle Royal
deck: Press office confirms McConnell's 287-0 record by technical decision, Senate Budget Committee remains winless against actual numbers
excerpt: The White House has officially announced the complete fight card for tonight's UFC Freedom 250 event on the South Lawn. The $700,000 lawn restoration is listed as a line item alongside fighter purses in the official event budget.

headline: GSA Officials Successfully Locate Missing Field Office After Thorough Search of Building They've Been Paying Rent On
deck: Agency that manages all federal property briefly misplaces own workspace in routine audit.
excerpt: The General Services Administration, which oversees $500 billion in federal real estate, recently discovered their field office had either moved or disappeared entirely. The space was eventually found to be either vacant or occupied by a completely different agency.

headline: White House Becomes First Federal Property to Require Waist-to-Height Ratio for Military Spectators
deck: 1,200 service members must meet fitness standards to watch cage fights on South Lawn
excerpt: The Pentagon has issued specific body measurement requirements for military personnel attending the President's birthday UFC event. Because nothing says 'land of the free' like measuring soldiers' waistlines for entertainment access.

headline: FEMA Disaster Chief's Teleportation Claims Create New Emergency for Trump Administration
deck: President asks 'What does teleport mean?' after learning top disaster official claims divine transportation to Waffle House.
excerpt: Gregg Phillips, who oversees billions in disaster relief, insists he was supernaturally transported 50 miles to a Georgia restaurant. White House scrambles to contain the metaphysical crisis.

headline: Trump's America 250 Concert Series Achieves Perfect Unity as Everyone Agrees to Leave
deck: President pivots to MAGA rally after performers mysteriously discover event was political
excerpt: More than half of the Great American State Fair lineup dropped out when they learned the 'nonpartisan' celebration was organized by Freedom 250, a Trump-backed group. The President now wants to replace 'overpriced singers' with a Make America Great Again rally instead.

headline: Treasury Secretary Gets Heated Defending Plans for Trump's Face on $250 Bill That Doesn't Exist and Would Be Illegal
deck: Scott Bessent asks to be called 'Doctor' while explaining why breaking 160-year-old currency law is just 'appropriate planning'
excerpt: The Treasury Department has been working on prototypes for a $250 bill featuring President Trump's portrait, despite federal law explicitly prohibiting living people on currency since 1866. The woman who pointed this out was promptly reassigned.

headline: Pastor Assures Congregation That 22-Foot Golden Trump is 'Not a Golden Calf,' Just Regular Idol
deck: Evangelical leader clarifies that massive gilded statue at golf course represents 'honor,' not worship, while standing next to altar
excerpt: A 22-foot golden statue of President Trump was dedicated at his Miami golf club by Pastor Mark Burns, who insisted the ceremony was about 'honor, not worship.' The distinction appears lost on several thousand years of religious tradition.

headline: President Successfully Negotiates Settlement With Himself for $1.8 Billion
deck: Trump administration hails 'tough but fair' deal after grueling talks between Trump and Trump
excerpt: Sources close to the negotiations say both sides were surprisingly reasonable. Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche, formerly Trump's personal lawyer, praised his own negotiating skills.

headline: Social Security Administration Achieves Perfect Government Efficiency: Spends $15K To Recover $8K
deck: Agency celebrates collecting 53 cents for every dollar spent on collection efforts
excerpt: The Social Security Administration has mastered the art of government accounting by spending $14,492 to recover $8,129 in overpayments. Officials praised the operation as a stunning example of fiscal responsibility.
sourcePublication: Social Security Administration Office of the Inspector General

headline: White House Ballroom Construction Continues Despite Judge's Order, Features Grand Staircase Leading to Wall
deck: Trump's $400 million ballroom rises above ground with architectural flourishes including exterior stairs that terminate at a side of the building with no door
excerpt: Federal construction crews are building the first floor of President Trump's controversial White House ballroom, complete with original design flaws. The ballroom 'essentially becomes a shed for what's being built under,' Trump explained.

headline: Democratic Governor Dramatically Shortens Sentence for Election-Denying Trump Ally After Presidential Threats
deck: Colorado's Jared Polis grants clemency to voting machine tamperer as his own party calls move 'mind-boggling'
excerpt: Gov. Polis commuted Tina Peters' 9-year sentence for election crimes, citing fairness while fellow Democrats blast the decision. The move comes after Trump threatened 'harsh measures' if Colorado didn't free his ally.

headline: Pentagon Selects Official AI Chatbot Lineup, Anthropic Still in Timeout Corner
deck: Defense Department chooses eight tech giants to help robots learn warfare while one company refuses to play nice.
excerpt: The Pentagon has signed deals with Amazon, Google, Microsoft, OpenAI and others to build an 'AI-first fighting force.' Anthropic remains banned after demanding safety guardrails for lethal weapons.

headline: Trump Administration Fires All Scientists Overseeing Nation's $9 Billion Science Budget Because They Wouldn't Stop Doing Science
deck: 24 eminent researchers terminated via email for daring to suggest cutting science funding might hurt science
excerpt: The entire National Science Board was fired Friday in a terse email thanking them for their service. Their crime: providing scientific oversight of scientific funding while being scientists.

headline: DHS Solves Shutdown by Ordering Furloughed Workers to Come Back and Not Get Paid
deck: Department discovers brilliant loophole: just pretend the shutdown isn't happening
excerpt: After 67 days of partial shutdown, Homeland Security has cracked the code on government efficiency. Simply order all furloughed employees back to work while remaining technically unfunded, creating what experts call 'Schrödinger's Payroll.'

headline: Labor Secretary Resigns Amid Workplace Misconduct Investigation While Leading Historic Workforce Reduction
deck: Department that lost 25% of staff under workplace violations probe gets new leader.
excerpt: Lori Chavez-DeRemer stepped down from leading the Labor Department following internal investigations into alleged workplace misconduct. The department's workforce had shrunk by 25% during her tenure.

headline: Trump Re-Nominates FEMA Chief He Fired For Saying FEMA Should Exist
deck: Cameron Hamilton returns to lead agency after being escorted out for defending its existence
excerpt: Less than a year after firing Cameron Hamilton for testifying that FEMA shouldn't be eliminated, Trump plans to nominate him to permanently run the agency. Hamilton was given a lie detector test and accidentally tipped off to his own firing.

headline: Trump Administration Proposes Solving Government Building Maintenance Issues with Literal Magic Paint
deck: President claims 'magic paint with silicate' will strengthen stone and prevent staining, experts say it doesn't exist
excerpt: The White House has formally submitted plans to coat the Eisenhower Executive Office Building with what Trump calls 'magic paint.' Preservation experts warn the miracle coating could cause irreversible damage to the 1888 structure.

headline: Nation's King Graciously Permits Millions to Publicly Protest Nation's King
deck: An estimated eight to nine million Americans exercised their constitutional rights to free speech and assembly in order to announce that their constitutional rights no longer exist.
excerpt: Eight to nine million Americans freely assembled to announce that free assembly is under threat. The king, who is not a king, was unavailable for comment. The deleted video was also unavailable.

headline: House Adjourns Itself Before Congressman Can Finish Sentence, Sets New Land Speed Record
deck: In a display of procedural athleticism not seen since the last time someone tried to say something, the U.S. House gaveled out Thursday before Rep. Glenn Ivey could complete his opening remarks.
excerpt: The complete official transcript of the session runs to one sentence. A war continued unaffected. Rep. Ivey's mouth remained open. The gavel has been secured.

headline: DHS Confirms $1 Billion Worth of Warehouses Are, In Fact, Warehouses
deck: After a thorough review, the Department of Homeland Security has verified that eleven large, empty buildings it purchased to house immigrants are large, empty buildings.
excerpt: After a thorough review, the Department of Homeland Security has verified that eleven large, empty buildings are large, empty buildings. Officials are proud of the loading docks.

headline: Experts Explore Definitive Link Between Sun God Sacrifices and Global Warming
deck: A shocking investigation into ancient ritual practices and their role in the modern climate crisis.
excerpt: A shocking investigation into ancient ritual practices and their role in the modern climate crisis. The results will not surprise anyone who has read the comments section.

headline: Now Hiring: President of the United States — See Full Job Description and Benefits Package
deck: Think you've got what it takes to be the leader of the free world? Review the qualifications, compensation structure, and nuclear launch protocol.
excerpt: Think you've got what it takes? Review the qualifications, compensation structure, and nuclear launch protocol. Benefits include Air Force One and complete immunity.
